title: senecio crenatus
intro: Senecio crenatus, also known as Rake's fork, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio crenatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
